---
title: "Projects"
---

## Heart Disease Prediction

### Objective
Compare binary classification machine learning methods

### Methods
- Logistic Regression
- Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA)
- Quadratic Discriminant Analysis (QDA)

### Results
Type of chest pain, number of major vessels, and blood disorder were found to be the potential risk factors that could cause heart disease and the algorithm with the lowest test error rate after 5-fold cross validation was Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA).

### Tools
Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Matplotlib

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/DataWale)

---

## Human Stress Prediction

### Objective
Analyze stress indicators using machine learning techniques.

### Methods
- Data preprocessing
- Feature engineering
- Classification models

### Tools
Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/DataWale)

---

## Cancer Incidence Analysis

### Objective
Study cancer trends and incidence patterns using epidemiological data.

### Methods
- Statistical analysis
- Visualization
- Trend analysis

### Tools
R, ggplot2, dplyr

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/DataWale)
